info.title: Qlik Quizzer API
info.description: API for Qlik certification quiz generation and validation.

post.summary: Send a message to the chatbot
post.description: Handles user inputs and provides responses. Users can start by entering 'Hello', followed by selecting a quiz using numeric inputs (1: QSBA, 2: QSDA, 3: QSSA).

message.description: Bot response. May include quiz questions, feedback on answers, or instructions for the next step.

400.description: Invalid input provided. For example, an empty message or unsupported quiz selection.
